purpose: Adds a guard in hci_cmd_sync_queue to return -ENODEV when HCI_UNREGISTER flag is set, preventing queuing commands after device unregistration and avoiding use-after-free.
Removes an unnecessary asm/termios.h include from drivers/tty/n_hdlc.c, relying on linux/tty.h which already pulls termios.h, simplifying header dependencies.
Adds N/A store metric description to perf-c2c documentation.

Adds vma lock handling for huge page VMAs, fixes race and double free during vma split and unmap, ensures lock exists for all VM_MAYSHARE vmas, updates sharing logic to require lock, removes redundant lock/unlock, preventing future sharing bugs.
Adds AVDD and MICVDD supply properties to the rt5682s device tree binding, documenting regulator supplies for analog power and microphone bias, and updates required properties list.
Adds missing iounmap call in zorro7xx_remove_one to free memory mapped region, fixing a resource leak when probe error path releases resource not freed in remove.
Remove an unused work_struct field from the mlx5e_async_ctx struct in the kTLS TX code, cleaning up dead code.
Changes cfg80211_auth_request::key_idx from unsigned to signed to allow -1 when key is NULL, avoiding static checker warnings and potential misuse.
Removes the commented CONFIG_SURFACE_PLATFORMS line from two RISC‑V defconfig files to reorder entries, matching savedefconfig ordering; no functional change.
Adds a helper function to detect FD mode and replaces inline checks in FIFO and ring code.
Adds logic to skip RTC tests when the RTC device is missing, removing hard failures and improving test robustness.
Removes a redundant assignment to the variable 'bytes' in echoaudio midi output, eliminating a dead store warning and cleaning up code.

This commit removes the unconditional dependency of rcuscale on RCU Tasks, conditionally compiling tasks_ops only when CONFIG_TASKS_RCU is enabled, and updates test configs to use FORCE_TASKS_RCU. It reduces kernel size and complexity, preventing potential bugs from unnecessary RCU Tasks.
Removes duplicated 'be split' phrase from a comment in arch/x86/kvm/mmu/spte.h, cleaning up documentation.

Reverts earlier change that populated the dcn315 clock table using dcfclk values, because pmfw can leave dcfclk states disabled causing underflow. The revert restores previous logic to avoid a potential read underflow until a better solution is implemented.
Adds a compatible string for Renesas RZ/V2L SoC (r9a07g054-mali) to Mali Bifrost GPU device tree bindings, updating the enum list to include the new SoC.
Renames the struct pcie_port to dw_pcie_rp across the DW PCIe core driver to improve naming consistency with other DW-prefixed structures.
Changes the printf format specifier from %#06hx to %#06x to match the promoted int type of the argument, eliminating a clang format warning.
Fixes a signed comparison bug in MIPS jump_label range check that caused false warnings for negative offsets by casting the upper bound to long.

Removes the HW_VAR_H2C_FW_P2P_PS_OFFLOAD case from SetHwReg8188EU, replaces calls with direct rtl8188e_set_p2p_ps_offload_cmd, and deletes the enum value from hal_intf.h, simplifying the HAL interface.
Adds static qualifier to the cavium_erratum_23154_cpus array to limit its linkage and eliminate sparse warnings.
The commit removes incorrect interrupt flag specifications from MDSS device tree bindings, replacing <0 IRQ_TYPE_*> with <0> to correct the provider’s single-cell interrupt model.
Renames dynamic array handling to generic array handling, adds array allocation fields to ctrl_ref, updates allocation logic, and adjusts comments to support future array size changes.
Adds support for additional Qualcomm SoCs and PMICs in the socinfo driver by extending lookup tables.
Change rtl8xxxu_print_chipinfo to correctly map chip_cut values 0-15 to letters A-P, replacing unknown string for values >E.

Removes the redundant .is_enabled field and its enable/disable/is_enabled helpers from the PRCMU clock driver, relying on the core's software enable count. The change cleans up the clock ops and eliminates duplicated state.
Refactors RISC-V init code to reduce CONFIG_XIP_KERNEL conditionals by grouping macros and moving pt_ops macro into a single #ifdef block, simplifying the code layout.
Enables QUP and GPI DMA nodes in the SM6350-Lena device tree, allowing future I2C functionality. Adds status='okay' to DMA and QUP nodes, effectively turning on hardware that was previously disabled.
Updates comments in rzg2l_thermal.c: clarifies macro comment, corrects typo, and enforces coding style by moving comment start to separate line.
Adds a check for acquiring the hardware semaphore before releasing SW_FW_SYNC; logs error and returns if acquisition fails, preventing an infinite loop that could occur when the hardware is removed.
Renames master/slave mode terminology to provider/consumer mode in pcm3168a driver, updating related logic and error messages to use modern ASoC DAI format constants.
Removes a dead macro definition for IS_SWAPFILE that is always defined, cleaning up unused code.
Adds GTP echo response handling for GTP-U and GTPv0, introduces restart counter, new IE, and attribute, enabling kernel to reply to echo requests when no userspace daemon is present.

Replaces cpumask_next_* calls with cpumask_first_* where the start index is -1, adding cpumask_first_zero to replace cpumask_next_zero. Improves performance and simplifies logic across several drivers and kernel files.
Removes unsupported firmware call to dtim_assoc in brcmfmac driver, eliminating error logs after roaming.

Adds a new board configuration (adl_rt5682) for the SOF RT5682 driver, enabling support for the alc5682 headset codec on platforms without a speaker amplifier by connecting it to SSP0 and updating ACPI match tables.
Adds a check in io_sendmsg_zc to return -EOPNOTSUPP when the socket does not support zerocopy, mirroring earlier change for zerocopy send. Prevents misuse of unsupported protocols.
Adds a check for xeCJK.sty before loading it, preventing errors when the package is missing, and updates documentation notes.
Adds exception to checkpatch script to ignore macros starting with 'case', preventing false positives for in-kernel drivers.

Replaces the simple-KMS helper functions with the generic atomic helpers in the simpledrm driver, refactoring the code to use atomic plane/CRTC/encoder/connector structures. No functional changes, just architectural cleanup for better code sharing.

Adds a worker-based JPEG decoder interface for MT8195, enabling parallel use of up to three hardware decoders. Introduces new structures, functions, and m2m ops, and registers a new device variant for the decoder.
Removes redundant VPRINTK debug prints and the ata_scsi_dump_cdb() helper, cleaning up libata code and reducing unnecessary logging.
Adds extended blank optimization and zstate support for AMD display drivers, introducing new flags, structs, and logic to enable zstate during extra vblank when conditions are met.
Change hqd_destroy callback prototype to use enum kfd_preempt_type for reset_type, fixing CFI failure on Clang kernels.

Corrects the devicetree binding property name from 'reset' to 'resets' and adds 'additionalProperties: false' to enforce proper structure, fixing a documentation bug and preventing future validation errors.
Adds a conditional CFLAGS to suppress GCC 12 array-bounds warnings for ath9k mac.o, preventing noisy warnings during builds without KBUILD_EXTRA_WARN.
Replace pm_runtime_get_sync with pm_runtime_resume_and_get in sun8i-ss PRNG to use the correct runtime API, simplifying code and ensuring proper device resume handling.
Refactors fixed file install/remove logic into filetable, changes helper signatures to use io_ring_ctx, adds removal helper, updates callers.

Updates the imx8mq VPU device tree bindings to split the G1 and G2 decoder blocks into separate nodes, adjusting compatible strings, property lists, and examples to reflect independent power-domain control.
This commit removes the unused IWL_DEVICE_BZ_COMMON macro from iwlwifi cfg, merging its contents into the IWL_DEVICE_BZ macro, simplifying the device configuration definition.
